---
title: "Will's Tumor Somatic Mutation Landscape"
---

## Quarto

Quarto enables you to weave together content and executable code into a finished document. To learn more about Quarto see <https://quarto.org>.

```{r}
if (!require("BiocManager")) install.packages("BiocManager")
BiocManager::install("TCGAbiolinks")
```

```{r}
library(TCGAbiolinks)

# Clinical data
clinical <- GDCquery_clinic(project = "TARGET-WT", type = "clinical")

# MAF files
query_maf <- GDCquery(
  project = "TARGET-WT",
  data.category = "Simple Nucleotide Variation",
  data.type = "Masked Somatic Mutation",
  access = "open"
)

dir.create("GDCdata", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
GDCdownload(query_maf, directory = "GDCdata")
maf_data <- GDCprepare(query_maf, directory = "GDCdata")
```

```{r}
clinical$Tumor_Sample_Barcode <- clinical$submitter_id
maf_data$Tumor_Sample_Barcode <- substr(maf_data$Tumor_Sample_Barcode, 1, 16)
```

```{r}
library(maftools)

wt_maf <- read.maf(maf = maf_data, clinicalData = clinical)
plotmafSummary(wt_maf)
```
